purpose: Track routed work across FATHIYA queues before adapter execution or validation.

Hub.purpose: Routing and control decisions managed by FATHIYA Kernel.

Engineering Queue.purpose: Repo, schema, index, and validation work.

Model Queue.purpose: Route model selection, cost, context, and inference strategy.

Approval Queue.purpose: Any external side effect, publication, or execution-capable action.
